root_cause: CVR fell −0.29pp (3.66%→3.38%) because Google Ads traffic to kennedyspacecenter-tickets.com fell 30% (92k→64k users) while Paid CVR held completely flat (4.58%→4.59%) — a Level 2 mix exit routing story. ~75% of the apparent decline is an Easter 2026 calendar artifact (27,134 extra US domestic users in the final 6 days of pre). US domestic CVR is flat (+0.08pp, 4.35%→4.43%), confirming no conversion problem for the core audience.
